item.title: Fight the Power
item.dc:creator: CapCap

item.title: On a date weekend with my wife and reproduced a picture from last June. 10 months and a combined 250 pounds lost.
item.description:
Same photo shoot, same people. Feel so different! Photo was from June. I had weight loss surgery in August (duodenal switch) and she weight loss surgery in September (gastric bypass/RNY). Ask me anything, I’m an open book. Just please try to keep it positive. Most viral, wow thanks! If anyone is interested in following us dating each other at Disney, I’ve recently started an Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/disney.dating.couple/
Now lunch at Raglan Road, having my first drink in almost a year. Little scary!
Suggested by the barkeep. Pretty tasty. A little sweet, which was my goal.
item.dc:creator: learntorv

item.description: I'm considered tall for a lady, but my husband is my same height and I love it. Don't be shy short fellas! By the way Her name is Grace Hayes and here's her youtube channel. https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCARvd_Xh2rBrM8yEAp9JdMQ
item.dc:creator: noproblllama

item.title: Think he got a refund?
item.dc:creator: IAlwaysUpvoteSunsets

item.title: To be fair it is one kind of tie!
item.description:
I’m the only teacher in my building who always wears a tie. Professional ties, Garcia ties, cartoon ties, old ties (as in 1970-80s hand-me-downs), funky ties, ugly ties,…and well, you get the picture. I own over 130 ties. Almost all of them given to me. I believe I’ve paid for four. Well, there is one tie I wear that my students look for every day, a solid black tie. I only wear them on test days. The reasoning I tell my students a test is as professional as a Black Tie Affair. Whenever a student sees me with a black tie on and it is not for their class their eyes get big and ask panically, “DO WE HAVE A TEST?” I have now classically conditioned them to fear my ties. As a side note, we have finals. I also dress up for that. I’ve gone to the GoodWill and got a tuxedo. So on finals I wear that and my students laugh at it. TL;DR I wear black ties on test days and my kids are afraid of them now.
Proof of my collection!
item.dc:creator: Hotsauceman

item.title: I wish I were in a position to move
item.description: I matched with someone on Bumble recently. My profile says I’m a liberal and die-hard Democrat; her profile said she’s a moderate. I know I’m in Texas, but if her position is moderate, then I guess I must be…Pyotr Kropotkin? MOST VIRAL EDIT: the GOP has shown every indication that if they win Congress in 2022, they'll steal the Presidency in 2024. So make sure you and those you know vote Dem in *every* election you're eligible to vote in this year, because we won't be able to solve any problem in this country if we let them strangle democracy.
item.dc:creator: wingineer

item.title: Putin didn't expect this: In Finland year 2017 only 19% wanted to join Nato. Now it is 68%.
item.description:
https://www.latimes.com/world-nation/story/2022-04-24/as-finland-considers-nato-membership-citizens-mobilize-for-an-invasion-by-russia?fbclid=IwAR0gAtWJ0rNbGSVv1e-h4fIxUdDLt3D_j-K2_DP0U2quosWajsUbGyDHf9M
Enrollment for civilian military training in Finland has soared since Russia invaded Ukraine. (Finnish Reservists’ Assn.)
Finnish Reservists’ Assn. training. (Finnish Reservists’ Assn.) https://www.latimes.com/world-nation/story/2022-04-24/as-finland-considers-nato-membership-citizens-mobilize-for-an-invasion-by-russia?fbclid=IwAR0gAtWJ0rNbGSVv1e-h4fIxUdDLt3D_j-K2_DP0U2quosWajsUbGyDHf9M

item.title: "I'm still a baby and I will always be a baby"
item.dc:creator: IamSadAndTired

item.title: I may be doing this dad thing right.
item.description:
My 16 year old daughter sent me this out of the blue the other day, followed by these screenshots of a conversation she was having with a friend.
Sorry for the selfie but I wanted to include the comment she made underneath it. Her mum and I split a couple of years ago and I live by myself. This absolutely made my week, as a man I rarely get compliments and it kinda caught me guard.
item.dc:creator: StirlingMaloryArcher

item.title: Sibling Drama
item.description: #hospice #bigfamilyproblems EDIT 2: Guys! (And gals/ghouls/gremlins) I said I wanted to vent to Usersub! But you assholes banded together to get me to Most Viral. Thank you. ? My mother died of cancer when I was 3. Dad struggled to provide for all of us younger kids. He hated “assistance” and fought hard to not be on it. So he was unable to save. As of December, I was promoted and I now make more than my siblings. I have no spouse, no kids, and no mortgage. I owe him as much to give him a wonderful resting place when he couldn’t do so for mom. I don’t want bragging rights over him. I just know if he could, he’d have sold anything to bury me. He’s the only parent I remembered. EDIT: He just passed. I’m thankful he’s no longer in pain. Im going to go somewhere he’d love and toast my coffee to his memory. I just need to vent into the Usersub void. I’m the youngest of what was at one point nine kids. We are familiar with death and the funeral home is a familiar place, but I knew this would hit different. I’m planning on paying the $12k bill myself since my two oldest siblings are greedy and would hold it over everyone’s heads until they pass. Plus I knew my oldest sister would claim the $10k burial fund we all agreed to set aside from the sale of our grandmother’s house was spent paying the taxes and repairs on dad’s shithole house. A house that honestly should have been condemned since 2005. To be honest, I want to disappear from my family for a long while after dad passes. I know at least the two oldest will fight over his possessions. I’m washing my hands of them for a while. His slow decline is breaking me and I’ve told him today he doesn’t have to fight anymore.
item.dc:creator: Schmaron

item.title: Idea to upset both sides, instead of trying to create new laws that forbid or let Trans people use whichever restroom they want, why not just make all bathrooms unisex and make it so we can't watch each other poop by closing the gaps?
